subject: Biology
title: The Future of the Ocean
description: A micro-lesson that makes The Future of the Ocean usable.

hook.text: By 2050, the ocean could contain more plastic by weight than fish—if current trends continue.

buildup.text: Climate change, overfishing, pollution, and habitat destruction are hitting oceans simultaneously.

discovery.text: But recoveries happen fast when pressure is removed. Whale populations have rebounded from near extinction.

twist.text: Seaweed farming could feed billions, absorb CO₂, and create bioplastics—all from the ocean.

climax.text: The ocean's fate depends on choices made in the next decade. The science is clear; the action is not.

punchline.text: The ocean can heal. But only if we let it.

quiz.question: What could the ocean contain more of than fish by 2050?
